items.title: Claude Code hooks guide explains deterministic lifecycle automation
items.summary: Hooks run at lifecycle events and can deny, ask, or allow a tool call without pretending that silence equals approval.

items.title: Claude Code permissions page clarifies deny ask allow precedence
items.summary: Permission rules are enforced by Claude Code itself, and plan mode keeps edits off disk until approval.

items.title: Common workflows page highlights worktrees plan mode and piping into scripts
items.summary: The workflow guide recommends worktrees for isolated parallel sessions and plan mode for review before edits touch disk.
